zh.lifeSummary: Marie Marguerite DE CRAON於1368年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯勞。她於1384年與Johan I de Croy結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內圖爾-素-馬內享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CRAON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: Marie Marguerite DE CRAON was born in 1368, in Laon, Aisne, Picardie, France. She married Johan I de Croy in 1384. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1420, in Tours-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 52.

ko.Montereau, Loiret, Centre, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 몽로
ko.lifeSummary: Marie Marguerite DE CRAON(은)는 1368년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 라에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1384년 Johan I de Croy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 토우르스-수-마니에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Marie Marguerite DE CRAON родилась в 1368 г. в местности лаон, эисн, пикарди, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johan I de Croy в 1384 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности тоурс-сур-марн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.
